column1: Comprehensive Index of Ancient Aramaic Texts

This index catalogs known ancient texts written in various Aramaic dialects. Aramaic is a Semitic language that served as a lingua franca across the Near East and parts of Asia from approximately the 8th century BCE to the 8th century CE. The language exists in multiple dialects and scripts that evolved across different regions and time periods.
